title: The AI Aggregation Theory - Stratechery by Ben Thompson
snippet: Ben Thompson's analysis of how AI is reshaping the aggregation theory of the internet, examining the shift from distribution-based to intelligence-based platforms and its implications for incumbents.

title: Why Apple Intelligence Matters - Stratechery by Ben Thompson
snippet: An in-depth look at Apple's AI strategy and why on-device intelligence could be the company's most important strategic move since the App Store.
